displayMetadata.name: KEY INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Pokka Oolong Tea is brewed to perfection using selected 100% real brewed premium tea leaves for your harmonious enjoyment. It promises a robust balance of a rich, roasted flavour and a distinctively smooth taste - the original Oolong Tea that’s well-loved by many. It contains natural antioxidants from tea polyphenols. Also contains no preservatives, colouring and sugar.

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value:
• Consume upon opening
• Best served chilled

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Store in cool and dry place

product.description: Discover the brew, Oolong tea dates back over 400 years to Fujian Province. With its bold roasted flavours and rich aroma, the drink found its way to the Imperial court, where it was offered as a tribute to the Emperor and the royal family.

metaData.Ingredients: Water, Freshly Brewed Oolong Tea, Vitamin C
metaData.Key Information: Pokka Oolong Tea is brewed to perfection using premium tea leaves for your harmonious enjoyment. Indulge in this robust balance of taste and smoothness today. It contains natural antioxidants and no preservatives nor colouring.
